basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Anna University has officially announced the Project Associate Recruitment 2026 with 6 openings. The detailed notification was published on 05 May 2026 at Anna University Official Website. Candidates holding B.E/B.Tech, M.E/M.Tech, M.Com, MBA, or MCA qualifications in relevant disciplines can submit their offline applications on or before 22 May 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E or B.Tech/ M.E or M.Tech / M.Com / MBA / MCA
qualification.details: Project Associate - II: B.E or B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / B.E Environmental Engineering and B.E Energy & Environment with M.E or M.Tech Environmental Engineering or Environmental Management. Final year M.E. / M.Tech. Student can also eligible to apply. Project Associate - I: B.E or B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / B.E Environmental Engineering and B.E Energy & Environment / M.Com / MBA / MCA

salary_details.details: Project Associate - II: Rs.30,000/- Per Month Project Associate - I: Rs.25,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Anna University Project Associate posts is 22nd May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Project Associate posts at Anna University. These are distributed between Project Associate - II (5 posts) and Project Associate - I (1 post).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate - II?
faq.answer: For Project Associate - II, candidates need to have a B.E or B.Tech. in Civil Engineering / B.E Environmental Engineering and B.E Energy & Environment with M.E or M.Tech Environmental Engineering or Environmental Management. Final year M.E./M.Tech. students are also eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate - I is Rs. 25,000/- per month, and for Project Associate - II, it is Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for these posts is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate positions will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CES/Consultancy/Temporary Staff/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can final year M.E./M.Tech. students apply for Project Associate - II?
faq.answer: Yes, final year M.E. / M.Tech. students are eligible to apply for the Project Associate - II position.
